tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym slowem, tak aby powstal spojny i poprawny logicznie oraz gramatycznie tekst.
tasks.text:
Mount Everest, which stands on the border between Nepal and Tibet, is the highest mountain 1.1. _________ Earth. Its summit reaches about 8,849 metres above sea level, and the air there is so thin 1.2. _________ most climbers must carry bottles of oxygen to survive.

The first people to reach the top were Edmund Hillary, a beekeeper from New Zealand, 1.3. _________ Tenzing Norgay, a Sherpa guide from Nepal. They made their famous climb in 1953, and 1.4. _________ then thousands of others have followed in their footsteps. Reaching the summit, however, is far 1.5. _________ easy. The journey can take many weeks, because climbers need time to get 1.6. _________ to the lack of oxygen at high altitude.

The weather on the mountain is extremely dangerous, 1.7. _________ temperatures often falling below minus thirty degrees. Strong winds and sudden storms 1.8. _________ killed many experienced climbers over the years. For 1.9. _________ reason, expeditions usually attempt the final push to the top during a short period in May, when conditions are calmer.

Today Everest attracts hundreds of visitors each season. Sadly, this popularity 1.10. _________ created new problems, such as overcrowding and large amounts of rubbish left behind on the slopes.
